name: Vynn Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 19 Inch Height - TBL4507 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Introducing the VYNN 19 inch black iron table lamp, where functional design meets modern elegance. This sleek black lamp complements any room with its minimalist style. Crafted from iron, the lamp offers a sturdy and elegant presence, enhancing your space effortlessly. Standing 19 inches tall, it provides ample lighting for work or relaxation, creating an inviting atmosphere. 

A convenient USB port integrated into the lamp base makes charging your devices easy, combining technology with style. Whether placed on an office desk or a living room table, this lamp suits various settings with its timeless design. Illuminate your surroundings with the VYNN table lamp, an ideal choice for those who value simplicity and functionality. Elevate your space with this practical and beautiful lighting solution.
